name: Fritter, French
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle fruit slices of your choice with the lemon rind and sugar, then let stand for 2 to 3 hours.
2. Drain the fruit slices and dip them in the batter.
3. To make the batter, beat together egg yolks, milk, flour, salt, butter, and lemon juice (add 2 tbsp sugar and a dash of nutmeg).
4. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Fry the fruit slices in deep fat at 375°F until golden brown.
6. Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot with powdered sugar or a sweet syrup.
Source: Very old Betty Crocker Cook Book. Good Luck and Enjoy from Joni in Jersey
